name: Hollow Brick Calculator
seo_title: How Many Bricks Do I Need? – Calculator
seo_description: Calculate how many hollow bricks and mortar you need for walls and partitions. Includes waste factor. Free construction calculator.
example_label: Calculate hollow bricks for a wall 8m x 2.8m deducting 2.5m² for openings.

range_hints.descontar_huecos: Sum of all door and window areas

result_context: For a wall of {area_bruta} m² gross ({area_neta} m² net) you need {ladrillos_ud} hollow bricks and {mortero_kg} kg of mortar.
formula_display: Gross = Length x Height; Net = Gross - Openings; Bricks = Net x 32 per m²
mistakes: No descontar huecos of puertas and ventanas of the calculation
No Consider waste of the 5-10% per cortes and roturas
Use efficiency incorrecto according to tamaño of the brick (12×24×5cm ≈ 32 ud/m²)
description: Hollow Brick Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Hollow Brick Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
